title: reiner2009‘s Nature Overhaul
description: This mod adds new vegetation, biomes and other nature
body:
**Requirements**

This mod requires the following dependencies to run:
- Fabric API
- TerraBlender
- GeckoLib

Make sure both are installed, otherwise the mod will not load correctly.

**DESCRIPTION**

Nature Overhaul expands Minecraft with a variety of new vegetation types and significantly enhances world generation.

Forests, meadows, and mountainous regions become more diverse, featuring new plant species and richer landscapes. Each world feels more vibrant and natural, with denser flora, varied tree types, and unique biomes that make exploration and building more engaging.

The mod is currently still in development and not yet complete.

Nature Overhaul is designed for players who want to experience a more dynamic, nature-focused world in Minecraft without losing the vanilla feel.

**WIKI**

Here you can find detailed information about the mod.

**Blocks**

Limestone
- Can be found abundantly underground
- Can be crafted into various decorative blocks:
> Limestone Stairs
> Limestone Slab
> Limestone Bricks
> Limestone Brick Stairs
> Limestone Brick Slab
> Limestone Brick Wall
> Smooth Limestone
> Smooth Limestone Slab
> Chiseled Limestone

Tomato Bush
- Found in the Tropical Plains biome
- Drops:
> Tomato when broken by hand
> Itself when harvested with shear

Strawberry Sapling
- Found in temperate climates
- Drops:
> Fully grown: strawberries and the sapling
> Not fully grown: only the sapling

Nettle
- Found in temperate climates
- Deals damage depending on the entity:
> 1 damage
> 0.5 damage
> or no damage

Jungle Bush
- Common in jungles
- Slows down movement when inside
- Drops:
> Stick when broken by hand
> Itself when harvested with shears

Mango Plant
- Found in jungles
- Can be grown

Items

Tomato
- Provides 3 hunger and 0.6 saturation
- Can be grown on farmland

Strawberry
- Provides 1 hunger and 0.2 saturation
- Can be grown

Nettle Stew
- Provides 1 hunger and 0.2 saturation
- Crafted using a bowl and a nettle
- Nettle Stew gives you a regeneration effect for a few seconds.

Mango
- Can be used to breed orangutans
- Provides 5 hunger and 1 saturation

**Mobs**


Forest Watcher
- Spawns in Dark Forests
- Attacks with exploding wood


Giraffe
- Spawns in savannas
- Can be bred using leaf blocks

Orangutan
- Spawns in jungles
- Can be bred using mangos

Shark
- Spawns in deep lukewarm oceans
- This update will need Geckolib
